error_pam: Error: Could not get PAM info.
error_password_encrypt: Failed to encrypt password. Please contact support.
error_protocol_mismatch: Your app's version is incompatible with the desktop app's version. Please make sure that both are up-to-date.
error_pairing_packet_parse: Failed to parse pairing data. Please make sure that both the desktop and mobile app are up-to-date.
error_aes_time_mismatch: Your PC's clock doesn't match the time on your phone. Please make sure both devices are showing the same date and time.
error_account_disabled: Error: The Windows account is disabled.
unlock_error_time: Error: Time on PC does not match phone time.
unlock_error_app: Unknown app error. Please contact support.
ip_address_desc: Used for legacy pairing only. The phone connects to this network interface / IP address instead of discovering this PC automatically.
pairing_discovery_port_desc: UDP port your phone listens on to discover this PC while pairing.
pairing_server_port_desc: TCP port this PC listens on to receive pairing data from your phone.
unlock_server_port_desc: TCP port used for the connection that unlocks this PC. Changing it removes every device paired via UDP.
client_socket_timeout_desc: How long to wait (in seconds) for data from your phone during an unlock before giving up.
client_connect_timeout_desc: How long to wait (in seconds) when connecting to your phone before giving up.
client_connect_retries_desc: How many extra times to retry connecting to your phone after a failed attempt.
enable_debug_logs_desc: Writes detailed logs for troubleshooting. Requires an app restart to take effect.
confirm_remove_device: Are you sure you want to remove this device?
confirm_unlock_port_change: Changing the unlock port will remove every device that uses UDP. You will have to pair those devices again. Do you want to continue?
error_bluetooth_pairing: Bluetooth pairing failed. Please remove your phone if it's already paired and try again.
error_pairing_not_installed: Please install the service module first.
error_user_no_password: Your user does not have a password set. Please set one in Windows settings.
error_win_account_locked: Windows has locked your user account due to too many invalid login attempts. Please wait until the lock expires and try again.
error_invalid_user_input: The specified user could not be found.
error_invalid_user_or_no_password: The specified user could not be found or does not have a password set. Please set one in Windows settings.
error_invalid_user_or_incorrect_password: The username or password is incorrect.
error_pairing_server_init: Failed to initialize the pairing server. Please choose a different port in settings.
error_pairing_server_init_unk: Failed to initialize the pairing server. Please contact support.
error_unlock_server_init: Failed to initialize the unlock server. Please choose a different port in settings.
error_not_admin: Please run the app as admin/root.
notice_ms_account: Note: You are using a Microsoft account, so you need to enter your account password.
pairing_form_password_desc: Select a user and enter their password. Your login details get saved encrypted on your PC and won't be shared with anyone.
pairing_form_bt_select_desc: Open Bluetooth settings on your phone and scan for devices. Then wait until your phone appears in this list and select it.
pairing_form_bt_pair_desc: Please complete the Bluetooth pairing process on your phone and operating system.
pairing_form_qr_desc: Open the app on your phone and scan the QR code to pair. Alternatively, you can also enter the pairing code in the app.
pairing_method_type_automatic_desc:
Automatically opens an unlock prompt on your phone when your PC requests it.
For the best experience, you may need to disable battery optimizations.
pairing_method_type_manual_desc: Requires launching the app manually and requesting unlocking from within it.
pairing_use_legacy_desc: Uses the selected network interface from settings for pairing. Enable this when connecting over a VPN, where automatic discovery may not work.
pairing_method_tcp_desc: Alternative to UDP. Requires periodic re-pairing unless a static IP is set. Unlock prompts appear faster than with UDP.
pairing_method_udp_desc: Recommended for desktop PCs or notebooks used at home. Works on any local network or Wi-Fi. Both devices have to be on the same network.
pairing_method_bt_desc: Recommended for mobile notebooks or tablets. May be unreliable depending on your Bluetooth adapter. Uses a lot of battery power.
pairing_method_manual_udp_desc: Works on any local network or Wi-Fi. Both devices have to be on the same network.
service_setting_wait_for_key: Wait for key press at login
unlock_behavior_foreground_lock_only: Wait on lock, instant on login
unlock_behavior_foreground_always: Wait until login screen is shown
unlock_behavior_key_press_lock_only: Key press on lock, instant on login
service_setting_hide_pw_field: Hide password field on login screen
service_setting_pam_set_pw: Write password to PAM authentication chain
error_exec_setuid: Error setting execute and setuid bits for file '{}'.
error_unix_missing_dep: Could not find '{}'. Please install it with your package manager.
